mapper.insert: INSERT INTO commit_log ( commit_id, project_id, issue_id, branch_name, commit_hash, commit_message, author_name, author_email, committed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{commitId}, #{projectId}, #{issueId}, #{branchName}, #{commitHash}, #{commitMessage}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{committedAt}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO commit_log ( commit_id, project_id, issue_id, branch_name, commit_hash, commit_message, author_name, author_email, committed_at, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.commitId}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.issueId}, #{item.branchName}, #{item.commitHash}, #{item.commitMessage}, #{item.authorName}, #{item.authorEmail}, #{item.committedAt}, #{item.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT cl.commit_id, cl.project_id, cl.issue_id, cl.branch_name, cl.commit_hash, cl.commit_message, cl.author_name, cl.author_email, cl.committed_at, cl.created_at, i.title AS issue_title, i.issue_status_id, i.progress_rate FROM commit_log cl LEFT JOIN issue i ON i.issue_id = cl.issue_id WHERE cl.project_id = #{projectId} AND cl.branch_name = #{branchName} ORDER BY cl.committed_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT cl.commit_id, cl.project_id, cl.issue_id, cl.branch_name, cl.commit_hash, cl.commit_message, cl.author_name, cl.author_email, cl.committed_at, cl.created_at, i.title AS issue_title, i.issue_status_id, i.progress_rate FROM commit_log cl LEFT JOIN issue i ON i.issue_id = cl.issue_id WHERE cl.commit_hash = #{commitHash}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM commit_log WHERE commit_hash = #{commitHash}

SELECT cl.commit_id, cl.project_id, cl.issue_id, cl.branch_name, cl.commit_hash, cl.commit_message, cl.author_name, cl.author_email, cl.committed_at, cl.created_at, i.title AS issue_title, i.issue_status_id, i.progress_rate FROM commit_log cl LEFT JOIN issue i ON i.issue_id = cl.issue_id WHERE cl.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY cl.committed_at DESC

SELECT cl.commit_id, cl.project_id, cl.issue_id, cl.branch_name, cl.commit_hash, cl.commit_message, cl.author_name, cl.author_email, cl.committed_at, cl.created_at, i.title AS issue_title, i.issue_status_id, i.progress_rate FROM commit_log cl LEFT JOIN issue i ON i.issue_id = cl.issue_id WHERE cl.issue_id = #{issueId} ORDER BY cl.committed_at DESC
